Momentum_Volume_Confirmation_Factor_5D.description: This factor combines 5-day price momentum with normalized volume growth to capture trending strength and market participation. The momentum is derived from the 5-day return mean, while volume growth is standardized using Z-score to enhance signal robustness across different market conditions

variables.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day
variables.$volume: Volume of the stock on that day
variables.TS_MEAN($return, 5): Mean of daily returns over the past 5 days
variables.TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5): Percentage change in volume over the past 5 days
variables.ZSCORE(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5), 20): Z-score of volume change standardized over 20 days

Cross-sectional_Momentum_Volume_Factor_2.description: This factor evaluates the cross-sectional correlation between 20-day price momentum and volume growth to identify persistent trends. By using cross-sectional correlation, it captures both directional and magnitude information about price movements and market participation

variables.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day
variables.TS_MEAN($return, 20): Mean of daily returns over the past 20 days
variables.TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 20): Percentage change in volume over the past 20 days
variables.TS_CORR(TS_MEAN($return, 20), TS_PCTCHAN: Correlation between momentum and volume growth over 20 days

Normalized_Momentum_Volume_Factor_15D.description: This factor normalizes the product of 15-day price momentum and volume growth to create a stable, interpretable signal. Normalization ensures that the factor is not skewed by extreme values in either momentum or volume components

variables.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day
variables.TS_MEAN($return, 15): Mean of daily returns over the past 15 days
variables.TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 15): Percentage change in volume over the past 15 days
variables.ZSCORE(TS_MEAN($return, 15), 20): Z-score of momentum standardized over 20 days
variables.ZSCORE(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 15), 20): Z-score of volume growth standardized over 20 days
